titleStmt.title: SII 16.244: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 244. (A.R. No. 320 of 1920.) GOOTY, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the prākāra of the Rāmasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1483 (current), Raudri, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1560 A.D., May 9.

It records that the śeruvagāṇḍlu headed by Rāmayya and other servants, residing in the fort of Gutti, agreed to contribute annually a specified amount per head and make over the sum to Veṅkaṭayya Ayyavāru, a resident of Gautamagiri and attached to the maṭha for the merit of Yaṟa Timmarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1483 Agunaṭi ravudri saṁvatsara
vayiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vajrasiṁhvā
sanārūḍhulai pṛthvisāṁmrājyaṁ jēyucuṁḍaṁgānu gauta
magiri nityanivāsulaina paramanaiṣṭhikabrahmacaryāśramulaina veṁkaṭayya
Ayyavāriki gutidurgaṁ mīda rāmaya mōdalaina śeruvagāṁḍlu daṁṇaṁ
veṭi yicina dharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu yaradiṁmarājayavāriki pu
ṁṇyaṁgānu mī maṭhaṁ raghu rādhanaku durgaṁ mīṁda kolici
na seruvagāṁḍlu baṁṭu sahāgānu yaṁdaru galiginānu māku
baṁṭuku māḍa sari Ö0 . pālikigānu naḍapaka rāṁgalavāramu
Aṁduku muṁduvenakalaku yevvaru tappinānu raghupatipādālaku
tappinavāramu Ani voppi vrāyiṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
